Choose this skill to ready Belch.
Let loose a belch. Reduces opponent's health depending on player's health percentage. No damage if used against Drink. Negates healing if used against Water. Punishes if used against Fake.

Choose this skill to ready Bluff.
Fake a drink. If successful, no health is reduced. If opponent uses Belch, Bluff will be unavailable for two turns.

Choose this skill to ready Drink.
Take a swig of omnomberry juice. Reduces health.

Choose this skill to ready Water.
Drink water. Increases health. When used, three rounds must pass before using Water again.
